title: Custom print that ships on time

hero.headline: Inkline Print Co.
hero.subheadline: Screen printing, embroidery, and digital for teams and brands

body:
# Welcome

We help breweries, schools, and growing brands turn artwork into wearable and printable goods — with clear proofs, honest minimums, and rush options when you need them.

## What we do best

- Contract screen printing on cotton and blends
- Embroidery for hats and polos
- Posters, banners, and event signage

Browse the **catalog** for common blanks and minimums, or start a **project quote** if you already have art and quantities.

title: About Inkline
body:
# About Inkline Print Co.

Inkline started in 2011 as a two-press shop serving local bands and food trucks. Today we run automatic presses, a small embroidery cell, and a digital print station — but we still answer the phone and read your art files before we quote.

## How we work

1. You send garment type, quantities, and artwork (or a rough idea).
2. We reply with a proof, price, and ship date — usually within one business day.
3. You approve; we print; we ship or hold for pickup.

We are not a marketplace. Every job is produced in-house at our Chicago shop.

title: Recent work

hero.headline: Portfolio
hero.subheadline: A sample of client runs — not an exhaustive gallery

body:
# Recent work

These are representative jobs from the last two seasons. Your catalog and quote flow will show live blanks and pricing; this page is for credibility when you pitch a new client.

## Highlights

- **Lakeside Brewing** — 2-color tee run, 400 pieces, soft-hand water base
- **Northside FC** — hoodies + joggers, name/number personalization
- **Summit Health** — embroidered polos for 60 staff
- **Riverfest** — 3×6 banners and wayfinding posters

Ask for references in your industry when you submit a project quote.
